title: euphorbia stricta subsp. micrantha
intro: Euphorbia stricta subsp. micrantha, also known as dwarf spurge or small-leaved spurge, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, Euphorbia stricta subsp. micrantha has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Euphorbia stricta subsp. micrantha is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
